content: 当应用上线以后，运维面临的一大挑战是如何能在不影响已上线业务的情况下进行升级。本文将介绍如何使用Istio实现应用的灰度发布（金丝雀发布）

About Me Hi, I’m Xu Chuokun.
I am from Tianjin University of Technology, and I am a third-year undergraduate student in the School of Computer Science.
I am trying to learn the go language recently, and at the same time I am facing the choice of postgraduate entrance examination.
